title: Restore frontend app to Version 12 state

requirements.text: Revert all frontend source files to their Version 12 state by undoing all changes introduced in versions 13 through 16. This includes all pages (Home.tsx, About.tsx, Blog.tsx, BlogPost.tsx, Contact.tsx, Experience.tsx, Projects.tsx, Services.tsx, Skills.tsx, Testimonials.tsx, NotFound.tsx), all admin pages (Dashboard.tsx, BlogManagement.tsx, CategoriesManagement.tsx, ExperienceManagement.tsx, Help.tsx, LeadsManagement.tsx, ProjectsManagement.tsx, SeoManagement.tsx, ServicesManagement.tsx, SkillsManagement.tsx, SocialLinksManagement.tsx, TestimonialsManagement.tsx), all non-immutable components (AdminGuard.tsx, AdminSidebar.tsx, Footer.tsx, Layout.tsx, LoginButton.tsx, Navigation.tsx, ProfileSetup.tsx, SEOHead.tsx, ThemeToggle.tsx), all non-immutable hooks (useActorWrapper.ts, useQueries.ts), all styles (frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css), and configuration files (tailwind.config.js, frontend/index.html, frontend/src/App.tsx). Do not modify any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, and frontend/src/components/ui.

quotes: okay thanks now restore frontend app first

acceptanceCriteria: All frontend pages match their Version 12 implementations with no code from versions 13–16 present.
All admin pages match their Version 12 implementations.
All non-immutable components (Navigation, Footer, Layout, AdminSidebar, AdminGuard, LoginButton, ProfileSetup, SEOHead, ThemeToggle) match their Version 12 state.
Non-immutable hooks (useActorWrapper.ts, useQueries.ts) match their Version 12 state.
Global stylesheets (frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css) match their Version 12 state.
Tailwind config and other configuration files match their Version 12 state.
Immutable paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui) are unchanged.
The frontend application builds without errors.

constraints: Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not make any changes to the backend (backend/main.mo) in this build — frontend only.
Do not generate a migration.mo file in this build.
nonGoals: Reverting or modifying the backend (backend/main.mo) — this is frontend only.
Adding any new features or UI improvements beyond restoring Version 12 state.
